lede: A look at February 26 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Bibisara Assaubayeva and Li Na, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Pakistan
events.desc: The government of Pakistan declares "open war" against the Taliban in Afghanistan, initiating the 2026 Afghanistan–Pakistan War.

events.title: Trayvon Martin
events.desc: Seventeen-year-old African-American student Trayvon Martin is shot to death by neighborhood watch coordinator George Zimmerman in an altercation in Sanford, Florida.

events.title: Barings Bank
events.desc: The UK's oldest investment banking institute, Barings Bank, collapses after a rogue securities broker Nick Leeson loses $1.4 billion by speculating on the Singapore International Monetary Exchange using futures contracts.

events.title: Iran–Contra affair
events.desc: Iran–Contra affair: The Tower Commission rebukes President Ronald Reagan for not controlling his national security staff.

events.title: Superliner (railcar)
events.desc: The Superliner railcar enters revenue service with Amtrak.

events.title: February 26 incident
events.desc: In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

events.title: Adolf Hitler
events.desc: Adolf Hitler orders the Luftwaffe to be re-formed, violating the provisions of the Treaty of Versailles.

events.title: HMHS Britannic
events.desc: HMHS Britannic, sister to the RMS Titanic, is launched at Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.

events.title: Napoleon
events.desc: Napoleon Bonaparte escapes from exile on the island of Elba.

events.title: East India Company
events.desc: The British East India Company factory on Balambangan Island is destroyed by Moro pirates.

births.name: Joe Mullen
births.line: American ice hockey player and coach

births.name: Dante Ferretti
births.line: Italian art director and costume designer

births.name: Levi Strauss
births.line: German-American fashion designer, founded Levi Strauss & Co. (died 1902)

deaths.text: Arnošt Lustig, Czech author, playwright, and screenwriter
Heinrich Häberlin, Swiss judge and politician, President of the Swiss National Council
Anandi Gopal Joshi, First Indian women physician

observances.text: Christian feast day: Emily Malbone Morgan (Episcopal Church (USA))
Christian feast day: Li Tim-Oi (Anglican Church of Canada)
Day of Remembrance for Victims of Khojaly Massacre (Azerbaijan)
